name: Chocolate Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, flour, and cocoa in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until well combined.
3. Gradually add the low-fat milk while stirring constantly to prevent lumps.
4. Continue cooking until the mixture thickens and becomes creamy.
5. Stir in more cold milk until you achieve a smooth consistency.
6. Add vanilla extract and salt to taste (about 1/2 teaspoon of vanilla and a dash of salt).
7. In a separate pan, fry the bread slices until golden brown in the butter or margarine.
8. Serve the soup hot with the toasted bread on top.
Note: This comforting dish is perfect for a cold winter's day and loved by all ages.
